---
title: "Moroni Montoya"
subtitle: "Software Developer | Computer Science Student at BYU-Idaho"
---

## Hi, I'm Moroni!

I’m a Computer Science student at BYU-Idaho who enjoys building practical applications that solve real problems. I specialize in Python, C#, and web development, and I’m currently focused on developing full-stack apps and intelligent tools.

I’m actively preparing for **software engineering internships (Winter, Summer, and Fall 2027)**.


---

## Featured Projects

### 🌱 Sprout (Adulting App)
A mobile app built with Flutter and Firebase to help users build habits and track daily responsibilities.  
- Task tracking & progress system  
- Firebase authentication & database  
- Team-based development using Git  

👉 *This is my strongest real-world app project*

---

### 🎮 Tron Game
A Python-based game inspired by Tron with player vs AI mechanics.  
- Grid movement & collision detection  
- Intelligent enemy AI behavior  
- Real-time game logic  

---

### ✈️ iTravel Web App
A travel-focused web application for exploring destinations.  
- Interactive UI with JavaScript  
- Clean and responsive design  
- Focus on user experience  

---

### 🤖 JARVIS Assistant
A personal assistant system built in Python.  
- Voice & text interaction (planned)  
- Automation and task handling  
- Modular and scalable design  

---

## Skills

**Languages:** Python, C#, JavaScript  
**Web:** HTML, CSS, Front-End Development  
**Tools:** Git, GitHub, VS Code, Visual Studio  

**Other:**  
- Bilingual (English & Spanish)  
- Strong problem-solving mindset  
- Team collaboration  

---

## What I'm Looking For

I’m looking for opportunities to grow as a developer through internships where I can:
- Contribute to real-world software projects  
- Learn from experienced engineers  
- Continue building impactful applications  

---

## 📫 Contact Me

- Email: moronimontoya04@gmail.com  
- [My GitHub](https://github.com/Moroni-MB)  
- [My LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/moroni-montoya/)

---
